channel.title: scratch on tnychn
channel.description: Recent content in scratch on tnychn

item.title: HKCERT CTF 2021: 回到十二歲 Scratch Tic-Tac-Toe
item.description: This post is part of the HKCERT 2021 CTF series. This writeup is written by one of my teammates. Name 回到十二歲 (Scratch Tic-Tac-Toe) Tags misc Points 200 Difficulty ★★☆☆☆ Solves 86 (total of all four divisions) Release Date 2021-11-13 06:00:00 If you can beat me in the game I’ll give you the flag!
